title: Chuzume's Unobstructive Armors
description: You can still see your favorite skin even when wearing armor!!!
body:
![Armors!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f75bd39913346100927605ffe928d0516b40c409.png)

You've created such a wonderful skin, but it's frustrating when armor covers most of it, right?

But if the armor became completely invisible, it could be a problem in PvP or when facing heavily armed monsters. And some people might feel that crowns or necklaces just don’t suit them, right?

For those people, I created a resource pack that keeps armor as armor, but shrinks it down so that your skin doesn’t get completely hidden.



### Chainmail equipment will have a slightly different look than vanilla, more like lighter iron armor.
![Chainmail preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66ed7f51b43b218e5c069aeef051e4b22fd527e6_0.webp)

### All vanilla armor trims have been adapted for the armor in this resource pack!
![Trimmed armor preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/528a84ca2f81a291b1642315b069f80e7bf5a032.png)
